message:
fix: correct nanos→millis unit mismatch in 3 timeout paths (bd-be8cn)

asupersync Time::duration_since() returns nanoseconds (u64), but was
passed to Duration::from_millis() in tools.rs, http/client.rs, and
extension_dispatcher.rs. This caused bash command timeouts to fire
immediately (10ms tick = 10M nanos interpreted as 10M millis >> any
timeout) and HTTP body read timeouts to be wildly incorrect. Fixed
by using Duration::from_nanos() in all three sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
